title: PĂ•LLUMAJANDUSETTEVĂ•TETES KORRALDATAVATE NĂ„IDISĂœRITUSTE KAVANDAMISE JUHEND
description: A guide for agricultural enterprises to design and execute on-farm demonstration events. It presents a 6-step framework covering goal setting, host selection, programme planning, promotion, learning methods, and evaluation with practical tips and tools.
